Defective item:

Replacement Instructions

Keep the item in its original condition and packaging along with MRP tag and accessories for a successful pick-up.

Noise Control Active Noise Cancellation

About this item

  • Hi-Res Audio by LDAC in these earbuds ensures high-quality wireless audio streaming. LDAC delivers superior audio quality than other codec formats like AAC, SBC, etc., by compressing audio files more efficiently, letting you enjoy your favorite tunes with exceptional clarity and detail.
  • Active Noise Cancellation: Transcend chaos with the up to 32 dB active noise cancellation of the boAt Nirvana Ion ANC Pro TWS Earbuds.
  • 120HRS Playback: Listen to your favorite songs on repeat and keep up with the latest OTT content with up to 120 hours of playtime.
  • Dual EQ Modes with Crystal Bionic Sound: High-fidelity 10 mm drivers in these earbuds deliver Crystal Bionic Sound powered by HiFi for an immersive experience.
  • ENx Technology: Busy streets or cafes, the 4 set of mics on these earbuds deliver your voice clearly to the other side when you're on calls.

Product description

Welcome enhanced audio as these earbuds come with Hi-Res Audio by LDAC for an immersive experience. Designed to block up to 32 dB of background noise, these earbuds provide listening relaxation to the fullest. As you're not disturbed by intrusive background sounds, long trips become more enjoyable whether you're ticking off your watchlist or jamming to tracks by your favorite singer. To keep you entertained for hours, these earbuds have a huge playtime of up to 120 hours. While you have these earbuds plugged in, enjoy Crystal Bionic Sound powered by HiFi for enhanced listening along with the ability to choose either of the two equalizer modes. Moreover, the in-ear detection feature lets you plug in and dive into your favorite podcast instantly. What�s more, Bluetooth multipoint connectivity makes it easy to switch seamlessly from answering calls on your phone to watching an OTT episode on your tablet. These earbuds amp up gaming with up to 60 ms low-latency of BEAST� mode for synchronization of visuals and audio without bothersome lag. Nirvana Ion ANC is also designed with novelty functions like Adaptive EQ which makes content better audible with these earbuds plugged in. Furthermore, you can easily tap into the boAt Hearables app which is the ultimate tool for improving your audio experience, whether you're checking the connectivity, installing OTA updates, or experiencing other innovative functions. Pop in Nirvana Ion ANC for a ride away from the noise!

What is in the box?

  • TWS Earbuds
  • Additional Earmuffs
  • Cable
  • User Manual

    How are ratings calculated?
    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Customers say

    Customers give positive feedback about the earbuds' battery life, with one mentioning longer play time in a single charge. The sound quality and build quality receive mixed reviews, with some praising the sound while others find it unsatisfactory. Value for money is also mixed, with several customers considering it a waste of money.

    Product Summary: Boat Nirvana Ion ANC Pro, Hi-Res Audio LDAC,ANC(~32dB), 120Hrs Battery, App Support, Fast Charge, v5.3 Bluetooth TWS in Ear Earbuds Wireless Earphones with mic (Crystal Black)

    From boAt

    3.6 out of 5 stars, 113 ratings

    Customer reviews

    500+ bought in past month

    Price

    One-time purchase: ₹1,999.00 86% Savings

    List Price: ₹13,990.00

    Inclusive of all taxes

    Purchasing options

    Other sellers

    Other sellers

    About this Item

    • Hi-Res Audio by LDAC in these earbuds ensures high-quality wireless audio streaming. LDAC delivers superior audio quality than other codec formats like AAC, SBC, etc., by compressing audio files more efficiently, letting you enjoy your favorite tunes with exceptional clarity and detail.
    • Active Noise Cancellation: Transcend chaos with the up to 32 dB active noise cancellation of the boAt Nirvana Ion ANC Pro TWS Earbuds.
    • 120HRS Playback: Listen to your favorite songs on repeat and keep up with the latest OTT content with up to 120 hours of playtime.
    • Dual EQ Modes with Crystal Bionic Sound: High-fidelity 10 mm drivers in these earbuds deliver Crystal Bionic Sound powered by HiFi for an immersive experience.
    • ENx Technology: Busy streets or cafes, the 4 set of mics on these earbuds deliver your voice clearly to the other side when you're on calls.

    Product description

    Welcome enhanced audio as these earbuds come with Hi-Res Audio by LDAC for an immersive experience. Designed to block up to 32 dB of background noise, these earbuds provide listening relaxation to the fullest. As you're not disturbed by intrusive background sounds, long trips become more enjoyable whether you're ticking off your watchlist or jamming to tracks by your favorite singer. To keep you entertained for hours, these earbuds have a huge playtime of up to 120 hours. While you have these earbuds plugged in, enjoy Crystal Bionic Sound powered by HiFi for enhanced listening along with the ability to choose either of the two equalizer modes. Moreover, the in-ear detection feature lets you plug in and dive into your favorite podcast instantly. What�s more, Bluetooth multipoint connectivity makes it easy to switch seamlessly from answering calls on your phone to watching an OTT episode on your tablet. These earbuds amp up gaming with up to 60 ms low-latency of BEAST� mode for synchronization of visuals and audio without bothersome lag. Nirvana Ion ANC is also designed with novelty functions like Adaptive EQ which makes content better audible with these earbuds plugged in. Furthermore, you can easily tap into the boAt Hearables app which is the ultimate tool for improving your audio experience, whether you're checking the connectivity, installing OTA updates, or experiencing other innovative functions. Pop in Nirvana Ion ANC for a ride away from the noise!
